scope: GSC-only analysis (62 snapshots, 2026-05-07 to 2026-07-20, property www.bariatriccounselingcenter.com) plus keywords-master.json. Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual. Counts labeled 'keywords' are keyword counts, never page counts.
wins: Core local term 'bariatric counseling san antonio' holds the #2-3 tier at position 3.0 — the strongest defensible ranking in the set.
'bariatric surgery counseling' jumped to position 6.5 (delta +5.9, 4 impressions) and 'bariatric counselor' to 4.0 (delta +4.0) — the two biggest positive moves with real impressions.
'bariatric counseling near me' at 5.0 (delta +2.6) and 'weight loss counseling or therapy' at 11.2 (delta +5.1) both improved into or toward page 1.
'eating disorder counseling san antonio' improved sharply to 26.2 (delta +6.9) — still page 3, but trending the right way.

Top impression-pulling pages sit at or near page 1: the bariatric-surgery psychological-support guide (125 impressions @ pos 11.9), the FAQ page (116 @ 12.5), and the hydration blog (69 impressions @ pos 2.1).
needs_attention: Keyword coverage: 19 of 82 tracked keywords have GSC data across the snapshot history (15 registered in today's snapshot); 63 show none. NOTE this is a KEYWORD count, not a page count — and only 2 of 50 distinct target pages point at staging, so the gap is tracker/query-matching hygiene, not lost or unpublished pages. Most tracked terms simply have too little volume to register impressions in a single window.

Visibility drift: across the snapshot timeline, per-day impressions fell from 2,447 (2026-05-07) to 381 (2026-07-20) and impression-weighted avg position slipped from 14.87 to 25.71. The most recent days (779 -> 578 -> 381) are partly GSC reporting lag on fresh dates, so the tail is directional, not final.
CTR is near zero: 4 clicks on 381 impressions in today's snapshot — impressions are landing but not converting to clicks.

Commercial terms that slipped with real impressions: 'weight loss counseling san antonio' 10.5 (delta -4.5), 'weight loss counseling' 44.5 (delta -9.7), and 'bariatric counseling' at 5.6 (delta -1.1) — the last carries the most impressions (13) so even a small slip matters.

Core term erosion: 'bariatric counseling san antonio' has drifted #1 -> #2 -> #3 across the May/June/July reference snapshots (mom). CAVEAT: many of these positions rest on 1-2 impressions and swing day to day, so all deltas are directional only.
priority_actions: Tracker hygiene: repoint the 2 staging-targeted targetUrls in keywords-master.json to their live www equivalents, and spot-check the ~63 no-data terms for slug/URL mismatches so GSC can match them.

Fix CTR: add clear CTAs and internal links from the high-impression blog/FAQ pages (bariatric-surgery guide 125 imp @ 11.9, FAQ 116 imp @ 12.5) into the matching service/contact pages to convert impressions into clicks.
Defend the core local #1-3 terms: refresh title/meta and on-page copy for 'bariatric counseling san antonio' and 'bariatric counseling' to arrest the small slips before competitors close in.
On-page refresh for slipped commercial terms 'weight loss counseling san antonio' and 'weight loss counseling' (both fell with real impressions).
Add/confirm FAQ schema on service and FAQ pages for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility.
If a staging->prod publish backlog is suspected, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's own notes — do NOT infer a page count from keyword/GSC data.
summary: GSC-only pulse: core local terms (bariatric counseling san antonio @ 3.0, bariatric counselor @ 4.0, bariatric surgery counseling @ 6.5) are strong and mostly improving, but overall impressions and average position have drifted down over the quarter and CTR is near zero (4 clicks / 381 impressions). Top priority: tracker hygiene plus CTAs/internal links from high-impression blog and FAQ pages into service pages. Competitor and AI-visibility sections remain manual.
